name: City School Red Devil's Food Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and beat well.
3. Mix cocoa with coffee or water, then stir in red food coloring (if using).
4. Combine salt, baking soda, and cake flour in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, alternating with buttermilk.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 13x9-inch pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean, about 35 minutes.
9. Frost with your favorite frosting, if desired.
Los Angeles School System. Source: Los Angeles Times, 12-22-96. Makes 12 servings. Each serving, without frosting, contains approximately: 258 calories; 229 mg sodium; 36 mg cholesterol; 10 grams fat; 40 grams carbohydrates; 3 grams protein; 0.13 gram fiber.
